introSection: Blitzer (formerly known as Nitro) is a steel travelling roller coaster owned by North American Midway Entertainment. It has also operated under the name "Outlaw" at the Calgary Stampede.

sections.title: History
sections.content: This roller coaster was new in 2012.

fullText:
Blitzer (formerly known as Nitro) is a steel travelling roller coaster owned by North American Midway Entertainment. It has also operated under the name "Outlaw" at the Calgary Stampede.

This roller coaster was new in 2012.

Blue track with green supports.
